name: Peanut Butter Crunch Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Yellow cake mix; with pudding
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:50
Heat oven to 350. Grease and flour 9 x 13 pan.
Combine cake mix, brown sugar and peanut butter in a large bowl at low speed until crumbly.
Reserve half of the peanut butter mixture.
To the remaining peanut butter mixture, add water, oil and eggs; blend at low speed until mostened.
Beat for two minutes at high speed.
Stir in one quarter cup of chocolate chips and one quarter cup of peanut butter chips into the batter.
Pour batter into greased and floured pan.
In a small bowl, combine reserved half cup of peanut butter mixture, remaining chocolate chips and peanuts.
Sprinkle over batter.
Bake for 40 to 50 minutes at 350 until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Immediately sprinkle with remaining peanut butter chips; gently press into top of cake.
